Dashboard consumes shared CrisisSupportCard (bTIfU mount) without duplicated markup

ui_evidence.notes: Disclaimer in title column per AC-2/layout_notes; IR inventory parent_id is bTIdb
Applied via bubbleStyle on bTIdn; Tailwind text-muted-foreground may override IR font_color

critiques.finding: AC-3 names Bubble phosphor icons (bTIdt/bTIeE/bTIeM) but implementation uses lucide-react Phone/MessageSquare/Heart. Semantically correct and consistent with the brownfield stack, but not phosphor glyph parity.
critiques.alternative: Map IR phosphor icon names to closest lucide equivalents in a shared icon adapter, or document lucide as the canonical React mapping in decompose AC wording.

critiques.finding: Disclaimer bTIdn applies bubbleStyle(Text_caption_) then overrides with text-muted-foreground and text-xs, which can mask styles.json font_color (var(--color_aiRNbAaxgs_default)) and 12px size from Text_caption_.
critiques.alternative: Rely on .Text_caption_ alone or map muted token to --color_aiRNbAaxgs_default in tokens.css.

critiques.finding: Title/disclaimer column uses flex-col and gap-1 without display:flex, so gap-1 spacing may not apply; block stacking still works by default.
critiques.alternative: Add flex class: cn(..., 'flex min-w-0 flex-col gap-1').
